# GOVERNED_INTENT_TRANSFER_INGESTION_V1

This milestone introduces governed ingestion for explicit intent transfer
packages.

## Scope

- validate transfer integrity
- validate replay continuity
- preserve preview-first intake
- emit governed ingestion receipts
- produce preview-ready governance intake objects

## Boundary Statement

Governed transfer ingestion validates transfer admissibility but does not grant execution authority.

## Boundary

Ingestion does not execute, dispatch Codex, orchestrate, retry, continue hidden
work, broaden conversational interpretation, or create authority.
